AsIs.FromWhereClause: case_events e, amendments am, judgments j, addresses addr where e.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and am.case_number = e.case_number and am.amend_seq = (select min(am2.amend_seq) from amendments am2 where am2.case_number = e.case_number and am2.case_number = am.case_number) and e.judg_seq = j.judg_seq and addr.deft_id = j.deft_id and addr.addr_seq = (select max(a1.addr_seq) from addresses a1 where a1.addr_type = 'SERVICE' and a1.deft_case_number = e.case_number and a1.deft_id = j.deft_id and ((TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(a1.valid_from,'DD-MON-YY')) <= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YY')) and (TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(a1.valid_to,'DD-MON-YY')) >= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YY')) or a1.valid_to is null)) or (TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YY')) < TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(am.amend_date,'DD-MON-YY')) and a1.valid_to is null)))

AsIs.SelectClause: /*+ RULE */ decode( ce.deft_id, null, decode( def.solicitor_name, null, cm_general.superinitcap( def.name ), cm_general.superinitcap( def.solicitor_name )), decode( cas.rep_name, null, cm_general.superinitcap( plaintiff_details_1 ), cm_general.superinitcap( cas.rep_name )))
AsIs.FromWhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce, cases cas, defendants def where ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and cas.case_number = ce.case_number and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'APPLICANT_DEF' and def.case_number = ce.case_number and def.id || '' = nvl( ti.text_value, '1' )

AsIs.SelectClause: /*+ RULE */ 'The defendant pay the total of the sums mentioned above to the claimant'||decode(ti.text_value,null,null, ' on or before '||to_char(to_date(ti.text_value,'DD-MON-YYYY'),'DD fmMonth YYYY')||'.')||decode(ti2.text_value, null,null,' by instalments of #'||ti3.text_value||' per '||rtrim(lower(vv.description),'ly')||', the first instalment to be paid to the claimant on or before '|| to_char(to_date(ti4.text_value,'DD-MON-YYYY'),'DD fmMonth YYYY')||'.')
AsIs.FromWhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce, text_items ti2, item_details id2, text_items ti3, item_details id3,text_items ti4, item_details id4, valid_values vv where ti.text_detail_code=id.code and id.domain='PAYMENT_IN_FULL_DATE' and ti2.text_detail_code=id2.code and id2.domain='INSTALLMENT_PERIOD' and vv.vals_low_value=nvl(ti2.text_value,'WK') and vv.vals_details_code=id2.code and ti3.text_detail_code=id3.code and id3.domain='INSTALLMENT_AMOUNT' and ti4.text_detail_code=id4.code and id4.domain='FIRST_PAYMENT_DATE' and ti.text_case_number=ce.case_number and ti2.text_case_number=ce.case_number and ti3.text_case_number=ce.case_number and ti4.text_case_number=ce.case_number and ce.event_seq=P_EVENT_SEQ

text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code=id.code and id.domain='COST_TYPE' and ti.text_case_number=ce.case_number and ce.event_seq=P_EVENT_SEQ

case_events where event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

case_events where event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

AsIs.SelectClause: /*+ RULE */decode( substr(ti.text_value,2,1),'Q','On the '||to_char(to_date(ti2.text_value, 'DD-MON-YYYY'),'DD fmMonth YYYY')||' the court received your '||decode(ti.text_value,'AQ','allocation ','listing ')||'questionnaire. ****Either a fee of #'||ti3.text_value ||' or an application for a fee exemption or remission should have accompanied the questionnaire. Neither was enclosed.' ,'C','****Your '||decode(length(ti.text_value), 2,'claim', 'counterclaim')||' was '||decode( substr(ti.text_value,1,1), 'A',' allocated to the '|| decode(ti4.text_value, 'FT', 'fast track','multi-track'), 'listed for trial') || ' on '||to_char(to_date(ti5.text_value, 'DD-MON-YYYY'), 'DD fmMonth YYYY') || '. A fee of #' || ti3.text_value || ' was payable unless you had made an application for a fee exemption on remission. Neither have been received')

case_events e, amendments am, judgments j, addresses addr where e.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and am.case_number = e.case_number and am.amend_seq = (select min(am2.amend_seq) from amendments am2 where am2.case_number = e.case_number and am2.case_number = am.case_number) and e.judg_seq = j.judg_seq and addr.deft_id = j.deft_id and addr.addr_seq = (select max(a1.addr_seq) from addresses a1 where a1.addr_type = 'SERVICE' and a1.deft_case_number = e.case_number and a1.deft_id = j.deft_id and ((TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(a1.valid_from,'DD-MON-YYYY') ,'DD-MON-YYYY') <= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YYYY') ,'DD-MON-YYYY') and (TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(a1.valid_to,'DD-MON-YYYY') ,'DD-MON-YYYY') >= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YYYY'), 'DD-MON-YYYY') or a1.valid_to is null)) or (TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YYYY'),'DD-MON-YYYY') < TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(am.amend_date,'DD-MON-YYYY') ,'DD-MON-YYYY') and a1.valid_to is null and am.amend_seq = (select min(am3.amend_seq) from amendments am3 where am3.case_number = e.case_number and TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(am3.amend_date,'DD-MON-YYYY'),'DD-MON-YYYY') = (select min(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(am4.amend_date,'DD-MON-YYYY'),'DD-MON-YYYY')) from amendments am4 where am4.case_number = e.case_number)))))

case_events e, amendments am, judgments j, addresses addr where e.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and am.case_number = e.case_number and am.amend_seq = (select min(am2.amend_seq) from amendments am2 where am2.case_number = e.case_number and am2.case_number = am.case_number) and e.judg_seq = j.judg_seq and addr.deft_id = j.deft_id and addr.addr_seq = (select max(a1.addr_seq) from addresses a1 where a1.addr_type = 'SERVICE' and a1.deft_case_number = e.case_number and a1.deft_id = j.deft_id and ((TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(a1.valid_from,'DD-MON-YYYY') ,'DD-MON-YYYY') <= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YYYY') ,'DD-MON-YYYY') and (TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(a1.valid_to,'DD-MON-YYYY') ,'DD-MON-YYYY') >= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YYYY'), 'DD-MON-YYYY') or a1.valid_to is null)) or (TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YYYY'),'DD-MON-YYYY') < TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(am.amend_date,'DD-MON-YYYY') ,'DD-MON-YYYY') and a1.valid_to is null and am.amend_seq = (select min(am3.amend_seq) from amendments am3 where am3.case_number = e.case_number and TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(am3.amend_date,'DD-MON-YYYY'),'DD-MON-YYYY') = (select min(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(am4.amend_date,'DD-MON-YYYY'),'DD-MON-YYYY')) from amendments am4 where am4.case_number = e.case_number)))))

case_events e, amendments am, judgments j, addresses addr where e.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and am.case_number = e.case_number and am.amend_seq = (select min(am2.amend_seq) from amendments am2 where am2.case_number = e.case_number and am2.case_number = am.case_number) and e.judg_seq = j.judg_seq and addr.deft_id = j.deft_id and addr.addr_seq = (select max(a1.addr_seq) from addresses a1 where a1.addr_type = 'SERVICE' and a1.deft_case_number = e.case_number and a1.deft_id = j.deft_id and ((TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(a1.valid_from,'DD-MON-YYYY') ,'DD-MON-YYYY') <= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YYYY') ,'DD-MON-YYYY') and (TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(a1.valid_to,'DD-MON-YYYY') ,'DD-MON-YYYY') >= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YYYY'), 'DD-MON-YYYY') or a1.valid_to is null)) or (TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YYYY'),'DD-MON-YYYY') < TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(am.amend_date,'DD-MON-YYYY') ,'DD-MON-YYYY') and a1.valid_to is null and am.amend_seq = (select min(am3.amend_seq) from amendments am3 where am3.case_number = e.case_number and TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(am3.amend_date,'DD-MON-YYYY'),'DD-MON-YYYY') = (select min(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(am4.amend_date,'DD-MON-YYYY'),'DD-MON-YYYY')) from amendments am4 where am4.case_number = e.case_number)))))

case_events e, amendments am, judgments j, addresses addr where e.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and am.case_number = e.case_number and am.amend_seq = (select min(am2.amend_seq) from amendments am2 where am2.case_number = e.case_number and am2.case_number = am.case_number) and e.judg_seq = j.judg_seq and addr.deft_id = j.deft_id and addr.addr_seq = (select max(a1.addr_seq) from addresses a1 where a1.addr_type = 'SERVICE' and a1.deft_case_number = e.case_number and a1.deft_id = j.deft_id and ((TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(a1.valid_from,'DD-MON-YYYY') ,'DD-MON-YYYY') <= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YYYY') ,'DD-MON-YYYY') and (TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(a1.valid_to,'DD-MON-YYYY') ,'DD-MON-YYYY') >= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YYYY'), 'DD-MON-YYYY') or a1.valid_to is null)) or (TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YYYY'),'DD-MON-YYYY') < TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(am.amend_date,'DD-MON-YYYY') ,'DD-MON-YYYY') and a1.valid_to is null and am.amend_seq = (select min(am3.amend_seq) from amendments am3 where am3.case_number = e.case_number and TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(am3.amend_date,'DD-MON-YYYY'),'DD-MON-YYYY') = (select min(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(am4.amend_date,'DD-MON-YYYY'),'DD-MON-YYYY')) from amendments am4 where am4.case_number = e.case_number)))))

case_events e, amendments am, judgments j, addresses addr where e.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and am.case_number = e.case_number and am.amend_seq = (select min(am2.amend_seq) from amendments am2 where am2.case_number = e.case_number and am2.case_number = am.case_number) and e.judg_seq = j.judg_seq and addr.deft_id = j.deft_id and addr.addr_seq = (select max(a1.addr_seq) from addresses a1 where a1.addr_type = 'SERVICE' and a1.deft_case_number = e.case_number and a1.deft_id = j.deft_id and ((TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(a1.valid_from,'DD-MON-YYYY') ,'DD-MON-YYYY') <= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YYYY') ,'DD-MON-YYYY') and (TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(a1.valid_to,'DD-MON-YYYY') ,'DD-MON-YYYY') >= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YYYY'), 'DD-MON-YYYY') or a1.valid_to is null)) or (TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YYYY'),'DD-MON-YYYY') < TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(am.amend_date,'DD-MON-YYYY') ,'DD-MON-YYYY') and a1.valid_to is null and am.amend_seq = (select min(am3.amend_seq) from amendments am3 where am3.case_number = e.case_number and TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(am3.amend_date,'DD-MON-YYYY'),'DD-MON-YYYY') = (select min(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(am4.amend_date,'DD-MON-YYYY'),'DD-MON-YYYY')) from amendments am4 where am4.case_number = e.case_number)))))

AsIs.SelectClause: /*+ RULE */ decode(ti.text_value, 'SET', decode(ti2.text_value,'Y','Please return the court file.',null),'ADJ', null,'FIX', decode(ti3.text_value,'Y','Please return the court file.',null),'INIT', null)
AsIs.FromWhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, text_items ti2, item_details id2, text_items ti3, item_details id3,case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'NOTIFICATION_FOR' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ti2.text_detail_code = id2.code and id2.domain = 'SET_FILE_RET' and ti2.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ti3.text_detail_code = id3.code and id3.domain = 'FIX_FILE_RET' and ti3.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce,cases cas,defendants def,addresses addr where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'NEW_SERVICE_ADDR' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and cas.case_number = ce.case_number and def.case_number = ce.case_number and def.id = ce.deft_id and def.case_number = addr.deft_case_number and def.id = addr.deft_id and addr.valid_to is null and addr.addr_type = 'SERVICE' and addr.addr_seq = (select max(addr_seq) from addresses addr2 where ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and def.case_number = ce.case_number and def.id = nvl(ce.deft_id,1) and def.case_number = addr2.deft_case_number and def.id = addr2.deft_id and addr2.valid_to is null and addr2.addr_type = 'SERVICE')

AsIs.SelectClause: /*+ RULE */ decode(ti.text_value, 'SET', 'We have been notified that this case has now settled.', 'ADJ', 'The time estimate for trial is ' || lower(ti2.text_value) ||'.', 'FIX', 'This case has now been fixed for trial on the direction of the judge on ' || to_char(to_date(ti3.text_value, 'DD-MON-YYYY'), 'DD fmMonth YYYY') ||'. The time estimate for trial is ' || lower(ti5.text_value) ||'.', 'INIT', 'The time estimate for trial is ' || lower(ti4.text_value) ||'.')
AsIs.FromWhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, text_items ti2, item_details id2, text_items ti3, item_details id3, text_items ti4, item_details id4, text_items ti5, item_details id5, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'NOTIFICATION_FOR' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ti2.text_detail_code = id2.code and id2.domain = 'ADJ_TIME_ESTIMATE' and ti2.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ti3.text_detail_code = id3.code and id3.domain = 'FIX_NEW_FIX_DATE' and ti3.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ti4.text_detail_code = id4.code and id4.domain = 'INIT_TIME_ESTIMATE' and ti4.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ti5.text_detail_code = id5.code and id5.domain = 'FIX_TIME_ESTIMATE' and ti5.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

text_items ti,item_details id,case_events ce,cases cas,defendants def,addresses addr WHERE ti.text_detail_code = id.code AND id.domain = 'SOLICITOR_SELECT' AND ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number AND ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ AND cas.case_number = ce.case_number AND def.case_number = ce.case_number AND def.id = DECODE(ti.text_value,'DSOL1',1,'DSOL2',2,'DSOL3',3,'DSOL4',4,'DSOL5',5,'DSOL6',6,'DSOL7',7,'DSOL8',8,'DSOL9',9,1) AND def.case_number = addr.deft_case_number AND def.id = addr.deft_id AND addr.valid_to IS NULL AND addr.addr_type = 'SERVICE' AND addr.addr_seq = (SELECT MAX(addr1.addr_seq) FROM text_items ti1, item_details id1, case_Events ce1, cases cas1, defendants def1, addresses addr1 WHERE ti1.text_detail_code = id1.code AND id1.domain = 'SOLICITOR_SELECT' AND ti1.text_case_number = ce1.case_number AND ce1.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ AND cas1.case_number = ce1.case_number AND def1.case_number = ce1.case_number AND def1.id = DECODE(ti.text_value,'DSOL1',1,'DSOL2',2,'DSOL3',3,'DSOL4',4,'DSOL5',5,'DSOL6',6,'DSOL7',7,'DSOL8',8,'DSOL9',9,1) AND def1.case_number = addr1.deft_case_number AND def1.id = addr1.deft_id AND addr1.valid_to IS NULL AND addr1.addr_type = 'SERVICE')

AsIs.SelectClause: /*+ RULE */ 'The defendant pay the claimant #'||ti.text_value||' for '||decode(ti2.text_value,'OTH',lower(ti6.text_value),lower(vv.description))||decode(to_number(ti3.text_value),0,null,' and #'||ti3.text_value||' per day from '||to_char(to_date(ti4.text_value,'DD-MON-YYYY'),'DD fmMonth YYYY')||',')||' until possession is given to the claimant or payment is made under paragraph '||decode (ti5.text_value,'Y',5,4)||' below.'
AsIs.FromWhereClause: valid_values vv, text_items ti, item_details id, text_items ti2, item_details id2, text_items ti3, item_details id3, text_items ti4, item_details id4, text_items ti5, item_details id5, text_items ti6, item_details id6, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code=id.code and id.domain='AMOUNT_ORDERED' and ti2.text_detail_code=id2.code and id2.domain='AMOUNT_REPRESENTS' and ti3.text_detail_code=id3.code and id3.domain='DAILY_AMOUNT' and ti4.text_detail_code=id4.code and id4.domain='DAILY_START_DATE' and ti5.text_detail_code=id5.code and id5.domain='ORDER_FOR_COSTS' and ti6.text_detail_code=id6.code and id6.domain='AMOUNT_OTHERS' and ti6.text_case_number=ce.case_number and ti.text_case_number=ce.case_number and ti2.text_case_number=ce.case_number and ti3.text_case_number=ce.case_number and ti4.text_case_number=ce.case_number and ti5.text_case_number=ce.case_number and vv.vals_low_value=ti2.text_value and vv.vals_details_code=id2.code and ce.event_seq=P_EVENT_SEQ

AsIs.Description: IIT Requires amending 'or valid_to is null'
AsIs.FromWhereClause: case_events e, amendments am, judgments j, addresses addr where e.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and am.case_number = e.case_number and am.amend_seq = (select min(am2.amend_seq) from amendments am2 where am2.case_number = e.case_number and am2.case_number = am.case_number) and e.judg_seq = j.judg_seq and addr.deft_id = j.deft_id and addr.addr_seq = (select max(a1.addr_seq) from addresses a1 where a1.addr_type = 'SERVICE' and a1.deft_case_number = e.case_number and a1.deft_id = j.deft_id and ((TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(a1.valid_from,'DD-MON-YY')) <= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YY')) and (TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(a1.valid_to,'DD-MON-YY')) >= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YY')) or a1.valid_to is null)) or (TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YY')) < TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(am.amend_date,'DD-MON-YY')) and a1.valid_to is null)))
